planExample.title: 3D Visualization of Interiors and Exteriors – The Key to Successful Real Estate Sales
planExample.description:
Why is important? Buyerthis s make decisions based on emotions and visual perception. 3D visualization helps to present a property even before construction or renovation, creating a sense of space and style.



Our Services:

• 3D Interior Visualization – realistic images that convey comfort and functionality.

• 3D Exterior Visualization – striking visual solutions for facades and surrounding areas.

sergio.text: A fantastic service for anyone who wants to present their property professionally. The posts are perfect for social media platforms like Instagram and Facebook. Fast and high-quality work. If I need another property presentation, I will gladly turn to you again. 100% recommendation!

irina.text: Whenever I had a question, I received immediate help. Pleasant and quick communication. The team is very friendly, loves their work, and is always available. Clear recommendation!

aboutus.title: 3dplan.online - Your partner in creating high-quality real estate visualizations.
aboutus.description:
We, Anastasia Strauss and Yulia Simonova, are a team of professional designers and the creators of 3dplan.online.

Our mission is to help real estate agents work more professionally by creating compelling visual materials that make their listings more attractive.

Let’s create the perfect presentation for your property together!



We developed this service to significantly improve the visual presentation of properties for sale or rent. Striking 2D and 3D floor plans, along with photorealistic visualizations, help showcase real estate effectively, highlight its advantages over the competition, and attract more potential buyers or renters. This also contributes to increasing the property’s value during sale or rental.



How does it work?

We work with existing floor plans and sketches. All you need to do is scan or draw the current layout of the property and send it to us along with a description of the rooms

We’ll turn it into a professional graphic representation you can use in your marketing, presentations, and property brochures.



Let’s create the perfect presentation for your property together!

3dExterior.title: 3D visualizations of interior and exterior spaces
3dExterior.description:
Professional 3D visualization - a powerful tool for real estate presentation. We create photorealistic 3D images of interiors and exteriors, which allow you to showcase the future property in all its details even before construction or renovation begins. This helps potential clients and investors to see the final result and assess all the features and advantages of the project.



Who can benefit from this?

• Investors and developers who want to present visually appealing and clearly presented projects to their partners and clients.

• Real estate agencies working on the image of a future project and looking to present it in the best light, attracting more clients and increasing interest in sales or rentals.



Let your clients see the future today with high-quality 3D visualization!
3dExterior.instructionTitle: How to Order a Floor Plan: Step-by-Step Guide
3dExterior.step1: Send photos or videos of the site or interior, along with a description of materials and the desired style. The more details you provide, the more accurate the result will be.
3dExterior.step2: We will create initial 3D visualizations based on all your requirements and send them to you for approval.
3dExterior.step3: Once fully approved, we will deliver the final 3D visualizations in high resolution for use in your marketing.
3dExterior.faq1title: What information is required to create an interior visualization?
3dExterior.faq1description:
To deliver a high-quality result, we need the following:

– Photos or a video of the space

– A floor plan (either hand-drawn or architectural)

– Information about materials and the desired style or atmosphere.

The more detailed and accurate the input, the more realistic and precise the final result will be.
3dExterior.faq2title: How long does it take to create a visualization?
3dExterior.faq2description: Creating an interior visualization usually takes up to 10 business days (excluding the time needed for feedback and revisions). The timeline depends on the project’s complexity, the number of perspectives, and the required level of detail.
3dExterior.faq3title: Can I request changes after the visualization has been created?
3dExterior.faq3description: Yes. The process includes three stages. After each stage, you will receive a draft version and have the opportunity to request any changes or adjustments.
3dExterior.faq4title: In which formats will I receive the final visualizations?
3dExterior.faq4description:
You will receive the images in convenient formats:

– JPEG, TIFF, PNG in high resolution.

3dFurniture.title: 3D floor plan with furniture
3dFurniture.description:
We create photorealistic 3D floor plans that not only display the exact layout but also the furniture arrangement. These plans help clients see how the space will look in real life, with all the details and functionality. It’s the perfect tool for showcasing how the space can be used and for providing an accurate representation of the future property.



Why is this important?

• Realistic representation of the space: 3D floor plans with furniture allow clients to see the layout of the rooms, feel the atmosphere, and understand the style of the space, helping them make a more confident decision.

• Enhancing the agency’s image: High-quality visualizations highlight the professionalism of the agency, helping to stand out from competitors and attract discerning clients
3dFurniture.instructionTitle: How to Order a Floor Plan: Step-by-Step Guide.
3dFurniture.step1: Send us an existing floor plan – scanned or hand-drawn – with all measurements and any additional project information.
3dFurniture.step2: We will digitize your floor plan according to your requirements and send a draft for your approval.
3dFurniture.step3: Once approved, you will receive the final plan in the agreed formats and in high-resolution JPEG files for use in your marketing.
3dFurniture.listItem4: ✔️ Formats for websites and social networks: A4, 3:4, 5:4
3dFurniture.listItem5: On request: calculation of living area
3dFurniture.faq1title: What information is required to create a 2D/3D floor plan?
3dFurniture.faq1description:
Please include the following attachments in your email:

• A floor plan – scanned or hand-drawn – showing all wall, window, and door measurements.

• Indicate the location of the kitchen, bathrooms, and toilets.

• Label the purpose of each room.



In the body of the email, please specify:

• Your preferences regarding furniture layout.

• Preferred formats for the final floor plan.

• Whether the North arrow should be included



Additionally:

• Attach your company’s logo if you would like it to appear on the plan.

• If available, please include photos or videos of the property.
3dFurniture.faq2title: How long does it take to create a 2D/3D floor plan?
3dFurniture.faq2description: The creation of a floor plan usually takes up to 5 business days, depending on the complexity and scope of the project.
3dFurniture.faq3title: Can I make changes after the plan has been created?
3dFurniture.faq3description: Yes, absolutely. You will receive a draft version of the plan and have the opportunity to make any necessary edits or adjustments.
3dFurniture.faq4title: Do you offer certified living area calculations?
3dFurniture.faq4description:
We create floor plans and calculate living areas based on the measurements and data you provide. All square meter figures and dimensions we illustrate are approximate values.

We do not provide certified area calculations – our service is a graphic-based floor plan digitization service.

serviceInfo.title: 3D Floor Plan with Furniture
serviceInfo.description:
Based on your existing plan, we create professional 3D floor plans with carefully arranged furniture and harmonious interior design. This format clearly demonstrates the proportions, functionality, and atmosphere of the space.

You will receive two realistic perspectives for each property.

Optionally, the floor plan can include the surrounding area: terraces, parking spaces, garden, or relaxation areas. This provides a complete view not only of the interior but of the entire property.

Perfect for real estate listings, presentations, and a modern presentation of your property.
serviceInfo.item2: ✓ 1 or 2 views (top view and side view)
serviceInfo.item7: +50% — More than 10 rooms on the plan
serviceInfo.item8: +50% — Additional 2D/3D plan for the same property
serviceInfo.priceText: per floor plan for a property

2dFurniture.title: 2D floor plan with furniture
2dFurniture.description:
Our detailed 2D floor plans show not only the layout but also the furniture arrangement. This gives potential buyers and tenants a clear idea of how the space can be used and furnished.



Why is this important?

• Better spatial understanding: Customers can immediately see how to optimize the space and adapt it to their needs.

• Inviting living atmosphere: A furnished representation creates a sense of comfort and coziness even before the viewing.

2dFurniture.step3: Once approved, you will receive the final plan in the agreed formats and in high-resolution JPEG files for use in your marketing.
2dFurniture.instructionTitle: How to Order a Floor Plan: Step-by-Step Guide

serviceInfo.title: 2D Floor Plan with Furniture
serviceInfo.description:
A furnished 2D floor plan created based on your existing property plan and designed according to our concept or based on your photos and preferences.

Your floor plan will feature harmoniously arranged furniture that clearly highlights the proportions and layout of the space.

You can individually choose the color of the parquet flooring, tiles in the sanitary areas, and the terrace.

Ideal for real estate listings, brochures, and a clear, easy-to-understand presentation of your property.
serviceInfo.item2: ✓ 1 or 2 views (top view and side view)
serviceInfo.item7: +50% — More than 10 rooms on the plan
serviceInfo.item8: +50% — Additional 2D/3D plan for the same property
serviceInfo.priceText: per floor plan for a property

2dDim.title: 2D floor plan with dimensions
2dDim.description:
We create detailed 2D floor plans with precise measurements, helping potential buyers and tenants better understand the space and its functionality.



Why is this important?

• Accurate information: Our plans display exact room sizes, wall positions, doors, and windows, allowing clients to realistically envision their future home or office.

• Easier decision-making: Clear measurements make it easier for potential buyers or tenants to quickly determine whether a property meets their needs.

2dDim.step2: We will digitize your floor plan according to your requirements and send a draft for your approval.
2dDim.step3: Once approved, you will receive the final plan in the agreed formats and in high-resolution JPEG files for use in your marketing.

serviceInfo.title: 2D Floor Plan with Dimensions
serviceInfo.description:
A 2D floor plan created based on your existing property plan – ideal for hard-to-read, old, or modified drawings.

Your plan will be presented in a clear and clean layout, with precise measurement lines on all walls.

Kitchen and sanitary areas are included

Perfect for real estate listings.

security.policyDescription:
Protecting your personal data is very important to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of the legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003). In this privacy statement, we inform you about the most important aspects of data processing on our website.



1. Contacting Us and Inquiry Forms

If you contact us via a form on the website (e.g. questionnaire or contact form), the data you provide (name, email address, phone number, project details, etc.) will be stored for the purpose of processing your request and any follow-up questions. This data will not be shared without your consent.



2. Use of Google Fonts

Our website uses Google Fonts, a service of Google Ireland Limited, Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland. The fonts are loaded from Google servers when the website is accessed. Google may record your IP address and transfer it to the USA.

The legal basis is our legitimate interest pursuant to Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR to ensure a uniform and attractive website design.



More information:

https://developers.google.com/fonts/faq

https://policies.google.com/privacy



3. Social Media Plugins

Our website includes plugins and links to social networks (Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest), operated by third-party providers:

• Instagram: Meta Platforms Ireland Ltd., 4 Grand Canal Square, Dublin 2, Ireland

• Facebook: Meta Platforms Ireland Ltd., 4 Grand Canal Square, Dublin 2, Ireland

• Pinterest: Pinterest Europe Ltd., Palmerston House, 2nd Floor, Fenian Street, Dublin 2, Ireland



When visiting our site, data such as IP address, browser details, and interactions may be transmitted to these platforms, even if you are not logged in or do not have a profile on them.



For more information about how these networks process data, see their respective privacy policies:

• Instagram: https://privacycenter.instagram.com/

• Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/about/privacy

• Pinterest: https://policy.pinterest.com/de/privacy-policy



4. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, transfer, revoke, and object to your data.

If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law or your data protection rights have been otherwise infringed, you can file a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority:

www.dsb.gv.at



5. Responsible for Data Processing

Anastasiia Strauss

Witthauergasse 28/5

1180 Vienna, Austria



Contact:

Email: office@3dplan.online

packages.title: Service Packages
packages.description: The packages are designed for ordering floor plans within one month. You can place your orders throughout the month and are guaranteed a discount for the specified number of floor plans, regardless of the type — 2D or 3D.

interior.title: 3D Interior Visualization
interior.description:
Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of your future space with photorealistic 3D interior visualizations. We create detailed images that reflect the comfort, style, and functionality of your spaces—whether residential or commercial.

Such visualizations are an excellent tool for presenting projects to investors or successfully marketing completed solutions.

The interior concept and style are developed according to your preferences or can be proposed by our team of designers.

The cost per angle starts at €200.

exterior.title: 3D Exterior Visualization
exterior.description:
Bring your architectural concept to life with high-quality 3D facade visualizations. We produce realistic images of a building’s exterior, partially incorporating the surrounding environment—an ideal way to visually present a project during development or to showcase an existing property.

Modeling is based on architectural drawings, sketches, or photographs. The choice of materials, facade style, and surroundings is discussed individually.

The cost per angle starts at €400.

dimension.title: 2D Floor Plan with Dimensions
dimension.description: A 2D floor plan of a single-story property without furniture, including kitchen, bathroom, and toilet, with all essential measurements. For complete clarity, the plan features a table with room sizes and, if needed, a calculation of the living area. Your logo and a north arrow are also included.

furniture.title: 2D Floor Plan with Furniture
furniture.description: A 2D floor plan of a single-story property with furniture, arranged either according to real photos or based on our proposed design. The plan includes a table showing room sizes and, if required, a calculation of the living area. Your logo and a north arrow are also included.

3d.title: 3D Floor Plan with Furniture
3d.description:
A 3D floor plan of a single-story property with furniture, arranged either based on real photos or our suggested layout. The plan includes a table listing room sizes and, if needed, a calculation of the living area.

Your logo and a north arrow are also included.

1.question: How can I order a 2D/3D floor plan?
1.answer: Email us at office@3dplan.online with all details of your project. You can also order directly via the form on our website.

2.question: What information is needed to create a 2D/3D floor plan?
2.answer:
Please send to office@3dplan.online:

A scanned or hand-drawn plan of the existing property with room dimensions and labels

Photos of the property

Information on the location of plumbing and large appliances (TV, fridge, stove)

Details about flooring, doors, windows, and other materials to be included

Your billing information

3.question: How long does it take to create a 2D/3D floor plan?
3.answer:
Processing time for 2D or 3D plans (1–10 rooms per floor) is 4–5 days.

Delivery time may vary depending on project size, especially if the plan has more than 10 rooms.

4.question: Can changes be made after the floor plan is created?
4.answer: Yes, the price includes up to two rounds of revisions. You can adjust dimensions, furniture layout, or add details without extra cost.

5.question: In what format will I receive the floor plan?
5.answer: You will receive your project via email in PNG format with a transparent background, ideal for marketing. JPEG format is also available on request.

6.question: How long is my project stored?
6.answer:
The approved final project is stored for one year.

Working files are stored for three months; after this period, changes are no longer possible.

7.question: What are the payment terms?
7.answer: Payment is 100% in advance. Work on your project begins after payment is received.

8.question: Can you arrange furniture according to my photos?
8.answer: Yes, we can place furniture in a 2D or 3D plan based on your photos. We use standard 3D models, so the appearance may differ slightly.

9.question: Can you arrange furniture yourself, or do I need to provide a layout?
9.answer: We can arrange furniture considering room ergonomics and planning principles. If you have preferences, you can provide instructions.

10.question: Is there a discount for ordering 2D/3D plans for the same property?
10.answer: Yes, one plan costs €39, two plans €59, three plans €79. Each additional plan is 50% off.

11.question: Can you create a floor plan including the surrounding area?
11.answer: Yes, for an extra 50%: standard plan €39, plan with surrounding area €59. Parking, garden, patio, or pool can be added on request.

12.question: What is the price of a 2D/3D floor plan?
12.answer: Plans up to 10 rooms: €39. Plans over 10 rooms: +50%, €59.

13.question: Do you calculate floor areas?
13.answer: No, we provide a “clean” floor plan. You can add room areas, room names, and any other required information yourself, according to your needs.

14.question: Can I choose finishing materials for the 3D model?
14.answer:
Yes, when placing an online order, you can select floor and tile finishes from our standard material library or provide your own reference photos.



Interior walls and façades are rendered in a neutral white finish.

mainInstruction.title: How to order a floor plan: step-by-step guide
mainInstruction.step1: Send us your project details by email
mainInstruction.description1:
Email us and specify the type of plan you need: 2D with dimensions, 2D with furniture, or 3D with furniture.

Please include the following materials:

▪ Floor plans with dimensions and room labels

▪ Photos of the property

▪ Information about the location of plumbing and appliances (TV, fridge, stove)

▪ Details about flooring, doors, windows, and other materials

▪ Your billing information
mainInstruction.description2:
Once all required information is provided, you will receive an invoice.

Work on your project will begin as soon as payment is received.
mainInstruction.step3: Receive your finished project by email
mainInstruction.description3:
You will receive your completed project in JPEG or PNG format, ready to use in your marketing.

We provide a “clean” plan that you can enhance with all necessary details for presentation or sale.

If you contact us via a form on our website (e.g., contact form or inquiry form), the information you provide (name, email address, phone number, project details, etc.) will be stored for the purpose of processing your request and any follow-up questions.
Data sharing: Your data will not be shared with third parties without your explicit consent.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.description:
1. Application and Scope

These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all contracts concluded between Anastasiia Strauss (hereinafter referred to as “3DPlan.online”) and her clients (hereinafter referred to as the “Client”) concerning the creation and provision of 2D and 3D floor plans.The following terms apply to orders placed through our online shop by businesses.

The following terms and conditions apply to orders placed through our online shop by both consumers and business customers.

A consumer is any natural person who enters into a legal transaction for purposes that are predominantly outside their trade, business, or independent professional activity.

An entrepreneur is any natural or legal person, or a legal partnership with legal capacity, who, when entering into a legal transaction, acts in the exercise of their trade, business, or independent professional activity.

2. Description of Services

3DPlan.online provides professional graphic services, specifically the digitization of 2D real estate floor plans into presentation-ready 2D and 3D plans. Services include:

  • 2D floor plans with dimensions
  • 2D floor plans with furniture
  • 3D floor plans with furniture

Only those services and products explicitly specified in your order or contract will be provided.

3. Conclusion of Contract / Order

The purchase contract is concluded directly with 3DPlan.online. The display of products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer but is an invitation to submit an order.

You may initially add products to the shopping cart without obligation and may adjust your entries at any time before submitting a binding order using the provided editing tools.

The contract is concluded once you accept the offer for the products in your shopping cart by clicking the “Order” button. Immediately after submitting the order, you will receive confirmation by email along with an invoice for payment.

By making the payment, you confirm your agreement with the terms of service provided by 3DPlan.online.

Any changes or additions to the order after submission are only possible with our consent.

4. Prices and Payment

All prices are stated in Euro (EUR) and are valid only for payments in Euro. No VAT is charged (§6 para. 1 Z 27 UStG).

For payments in other currencies, 3DPlan.online reserves the right to charge an additional fee related to currency conversion and bank charges.

Payment must be made 100% in advance via bank transfer. Our bank details will be provided in a separate email.

Delivery or provision of services will occur only after full payment has been received.

5. Execution Times and Delivery

The standard execution time for 2D and 3D floor plans (for 1–10 rooms per floor) is 4–5 days.

Orders are delivered in PNG format (JPG upon request) via a download link.

Execution times may vary depending on the scope and complexity of the project. In particular, if there are more than 10 rooms or a large workload, the production time may be extended. In such cases, 3DPlan.online will inform the client of the expected execution times before issuing the invoice.

In case of delays caused by missing supplementary information from the client, force majeure, or other circumstances beyond our control, the delivery time will be extended accordingly.

Time required for corrections is not included in the stated 4–5 days and is considered additional working time.

6. Rights to Materials and Intellectual Property

Upon full payment, the usage rights are transferred to the client for private or commercial use within the scope of the agreed order.

The designer reserves the right to use the work for portfolio purposes, self-promotion, and marketing while maintaining confidentiality and without disclosing the client’s address or other personal data.

7. Withdrawal and Termination

Entrepreneurs do not have a statutory right of withdrawal.

8. Disclaimer

The provided 2D and 3D floor plans are the result of computer-generated graphic processing and serve exclusively visual and illustrative purposes. They do not constitute real photographs and may differ from the actual condition of the property.

The graphic materials are created based on plans, measurements, photographs and other information provided by the client. 3DPlan.online assumes no liability for the accuracy or completeness of the source data supplied by the client.

The visualizations do not constitute construction, architectural or technical planning documentation and may not be used as construction or engineering documents.

The representations are indicative only and are created without detailed architectural modelling, based on standard 3D models of furniture, decorative elements and structural components.

3DPlan.online shall not be liable for any inability to use the delivered files for reasons beyond its control (including technical limitations of the client’s hardware or software).

Towards Entrepreneurs (§ 1 UGB):

3DPlan.online shall not be liable for slight negligence.
Liability for intent and gross negligence shall remain unaffected.
Liability for loss of profit, consequential damages and indirect damages shall be excluded to the extent permitted by law.

Towards Consumers (§ 1 KSchG):

3DPlan.online shall be liable for damages resulting from injury to life, body or health in accordance with statutory provisions.

For other damages, 3DPlan.online shall only be liable in cases of intent or gross negligence.

In cases of slight negligence, 3DPlan.online shall only be liable for breach of essential contractual obligations and limited to the damage typically foreseeable under the contract.

Mandatory statutory liability provisions shall remain unaffected.

9. Client Cooperation

2D and 3D floor plans are created based on the plans, dimensions, photographs, and other specifications provided by the client.

The client undertakes to provide all documents and information required for proper service provision in a timely manner. This includes, in particular:

  • Photos of sufficient quality
  • Floor plans and construction drawings
  • Material preferences and technical project specifications
  • Other information at the designer’s discretion

The client is obliged to notify the service provider immediately if previously supplied information is incomplete or incorrect and to provide correct data without delay.

In the event that incorrect, incomplete, or delayed information is provided, the Client shall bear full responsibility for any changes in the quality of the result as well as for any extension of the performance period.

In such cases, the standard execution period (4–5 days) shall be extended by the time required to obtain and process the missing information.

10. Corrections, Warranty and Data Retention

10.1 Limitation of Corrections

A limited number of corrections is provided under this Agreement.

The parties agree that two rounds of corrections are included in the agreed remuneration.

Any additional changes or corrections exceeding this limit shall be carried out exclusively against separate remuneration based on prior written agreement.

The processing time for corrections is not included in the stated execution period of 4–5 business days and shall be considered additional working time.

10.2 Inspection, Notification of Defects and Warranty

Towards Entrepreneurs (§ 1 Austrian Commercial Code – UGB)

The entrepreneur is obliged to inspect the delivered services without undue delay upon receipt.

Recognizable defects must be notified in writing without undue delay (§ 377 UGB).

Hidden defects must be notified in writing immediately after their discovery.

If notification is not made in due time, the services shall be deemed approved and warranty claims shall be excluded.

The warranty period shall be 12 months from delivery, to the extent permitted by law.


Towards Consumers (§ 1 Austrian Consumer Protection Act – KSchG)

The statutory warranty provisions of the Austrian Civil Code (ABGB) shall apply.

The statutory warranty period shall be 2 years from delivery.

The consumer is requested to notify obvious defects within a reasonable period; however, failure to do so shall not affect the statutory warranty rights.

10.3 Data Retention

The final project approved by the client shall be stored for a period of 2 years to enable renewed access to the final files if necessary.

Editable working files (project files enabling further modifications) shall be stored for a period of 3 months from project acceptance.

After expiry of this period, further processing, modification or reconstruction of the project cannot be guaranteed and may only be possible upon renewed engagement and separate remuneration.

11. Confidentiality and Data Protection

Processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with applicable data protection regulations (GDPR). Detailed information is provided in our Privacy Policy.

12. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction

All legal relationships between 3DPlan.online and entrepreneurs are governed by Austrian law, excluding the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG).

The exclusive place of jurisdiction is the registered office of 3DPlan.online.

13. Miscellaneous

13.1 Force Majeure

3DPlan.online is not liable for delays or non-performance caused by force majeure (e.g., natural disasters, power outages, technical failures, governmental actions).

13.2 Severability Clause

If any provision of these GTC is invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions remains unaffected. The invalid provision shall be replaced by a provision that comes as close as possible to the original economic intent.

infoPage.title: Right of Withdrawal (Cancellation Policy)
infoPage.description:
1. Right of Withdrawal

If you are a consumer within the meaning of applicable consumer protection law, you have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen (14) days without giving any reason.

The withdrawal period is fourteen (14) days from the date of conclusion of the contract.

To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us:

Anastasiia Strauss
Witthauergasse 28/5
1180 Vienna
Austria
E-mail: office@3dplan.online

by means of a clear statement (e.g., a letter sent by post or e-mail) of your decision to withdraw from this contract.

To meet the withdrawal deadline, it is sufficient for you to send your communication before the withdrawal period has expired.

2. Effects of Withdrawal

If you withdraw from this contract, we shall reimburse all payments received from you, including the costs of standard delivery (except for any additional costs resulting from your choice of a type of delivery other than the least expensive standard delivery offered by us), without undue delay and in any event no later than fourteen (14) days from the day on which we are informed about your decision to withdraw.

Reimbursement will be made using the same means of payment as you used for the initial transaction, unless expressly agreed otherwise.

3. Early Expiry of the Right of Withdrawal (Digital Services)

In the case of digital services, the right of withdrawal expires prematurely if:

  • you have expressly requested that we begin the performance of the service before the withdrawal period has expired; and
  • you have acknowledged that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal once the contract has been fully performed.

This applies in particular to customized digital services created according to the client’s specifications, such as personalized 2D or 3D floor plans.

4. Exclusion of the Right of Withdrawal

The right of withdrawal does not apply in the following cases:

  • if the service has been fully performed with your explicit prior consent before the expiration of the 14-day withdrawal period, and you acknowledge that you are aware of losing your right of withdrawal;
  • if the service has been produced according to your individual specifications or tailored to your requirements, in particular personalized 2D/3D floor plans considering your individual wishes, including:
    • flooring and finishing materials;
    • door and window design;
    • other individual requirements in the creation of 2D or 3D floor plans.

5. Model Withdrawal Form

If you wish to withdraw from the contract, please complete and return this form:

Anastasiia Strauss
Witthauergasse 28/5
1180 Vienna
Austria
E-mail: office@3dplan.online

I/We () hereby withdraw from the contract concluded by me/us () for the provision of the following service:

Date of contract conclusion:
Name of consumer(s):
Address of consumer(s):
Signature (only if notified on paper):
Date:
(*) Delete as appropriate.
